fallback.title: Try Using Another Method
fallback.description: Having issues with biometrics? Try using another method

appDownload.title: Please log in to the mobile app to verify. Install it if needed.

otpVerification.title: Confirm Your Identity
otpVerification.description: We sent a 5 digit verification code to your email {{email}}. Go find it and enter it below to verify yourself.
otpVerification.incorrectHash: Missing required data, please go back and try again.

otpForm.resendCodeHint: Didn't receive a code from us? <hintLink>Resend Code</hintLink>
otpForm.error: Something went wrong when verifying One-Time Passcode. Please try again.

passwordVerification.title: Confirm Your Identity
passwordVerification.description: Complete your autofill by entering your master password

mobileVerification.title: Confirm Your Identity
mobileVerification.description: We sent a push notification to your mobile device. Find it and complete the verification.

error.title: Mobile Verification Failed
error.description: Looks like we couldn't verify it was you, please try again.
